name: klog
title: Klog
description: Track your time with klog – start, stop, and manage time tracking from Raycast
author: thomaslombart

commands.name: start-tracking
commands.title: Start Tracking
commands.subtitle: klog
commands.description: Start a new klog time tracking entry.

commands.name: stop-tracking
commands.title: Stop Tracking
commands.subtitle: klog
commands.description: Stop the current klog time tracking entry.

commands.name: edit-bookmark
commands.title: Edit Bookmark
commands.subtitle: klog
commands.description: Open a klog bookmark file in your editor.

preferences.name: klogPath
preferences.title: klog Path
preferences.description: Absolute path to the klog binary. Leave as 'klog' if it's in your PATH.

preferences.name: editorApp
preferences.title: Editor Application
preferences.description: Application name to open .klg files with. Leave empty to use the system default.
